2604.17293.title: Beyond "I Don't Know": Evaluating LLM Self-Awareness in Discriminating Data and Model Uncertainty
2604.17293.paper_summary: Reliable Large Language Models (LLMs) should abstain when confidence is insufficient. However, prior studies often treat refusal as a generic "I don't know'', failing to distinguish input-level ambiguity (data uncertainty) from capability limitations (model uncertainty). This lack of distinction limits downstream action decisions like requesting clarification or invoking external tools. In this work, we introduce UA-Bench, a benchmark of over 3,500 questions drawn from six datasets spanning knowledge-intensive and reasoning-intensive tasks, designed to evaluate explicit uncertainty attribution. An evaluation of 18 frontier LLMs shows that even state-of-the-art models struggle to reliably discriminate between data uncertainty and model uncertainty, and that high answer accuracy does not necessarily imply strong uncertainty attribution ability. To narrow this gap, we propose a lightweight data synthesis and reinforcement learning strategy. Experiments on both Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 and Qwen3-8B in thinking mode show that the proposed method improves uncertainty attribution while preserving answer accuracy. Our code and data are publicly available now.
2604.17293.paper_summary_zh: 可靠的大型語言模型（LLMs）應在信心不足時選擇不回應。<lb/>然而，先前的研究常常將拒絕視為一種通用的「我不知道」，未能區分輸入層級的模糊性（數據不確定性）與能力限制（模型不確定性）。<lb/>這種缺乏區分限制了後續行動決策，例如請求澄清或調用外部工具。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們介紹了UA-Bench，這是一個包含超過3,500個問題的基準，這些問題來自六個數據集，涵蓋知識密集型和推理密集型任務，旨在評估明確的不確定性歸因。<lb/>對18個前沿LLM的評估顯示，即使是最先進的模型也難以可靠地區分數據不確定性和模型不確定性，而高答案準確性並不一定意味著強大的不確定性歸因能力。<lb/>為了縮小這一差距，我們提出了一種輕量級的數據合成和強化學習策略。<lb/>在思考模式下對Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507和Qwen3-8B的實驗顯示，所提出的方法在保持答案準確性的同時改善了不確定性歸因。<lb/>我們的代碼和數據現在已公開可用。
2604.17293.author: Jingyi Ren et.al.
2604.17293.authors: Jingyi Ren, Ante Wang, Yunghwei Lai, Xiaolong Wang, Linlu Gong, Weitao Li, Weizhi Ma, Yang Liu
